reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.
blocking_reasons: The second same-head counted rerun of B04.R5 passed honestly on head e232a7762ea03a3eea391c6a4da6486b892eabdd and held the static router baseline because superiority was still not earned.
R6 remains blocked because router superiority has still not been re-earned on the counted lane.
Lobe promotion, externality widening, external comparative claims, and commercial activation remain blocked by order.

Do not open external comparative claims.

why_not_executable_now: The second same-head counted rerun of B04.R5 has already completed and did not earn router superiority. R6 remains non-executable, and any future counted reopening must be another same-head R5 rerun justified by new lab evidence.
